warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (Second Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 50-60 kmph with wave height up to 4.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Kedua)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 50-60 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 4.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, Penang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Melaka, Pahang and Terengganu until 1:00PM; Monday, 29 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Pulau Pinang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Melaka, Pahang dan Terengganu sehingga 1:00 tengah hari; Isnin, 29 Jun 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Phuket, Straits of Melaka, Samui, Tioman, northern part of Reef South and Sulu until 1:00PM; Monday, 29 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket, Selat Melaka, Samui, Tioman, utara Reef South dan Sulu sehingga 1:00 tengah hari; Isnin, 29 Jun 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Northern Straits of Melaka, Samui, Condore, Reef North and Layang-Layang within the period of Tuesday, 30 June 2026 until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Selat Melaka Utara, Samui, Condore, Reef North dan Layang-Layang dalam tempoh Selasa, 30 Jun 2026 sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Kedah  (Yan, Kuala Muda, Kulim and Bandar Baharu);  Penang ;  Perak  (Kerian, Larut, Matang and Selama, Hulu Perak, Kuala Kangsar, Manjung, Kinta, Perak Tengah, Bagan Datuk and Hilir Perak); and  Selangor  (Sabak Bernam, Kuala Selangor, Klang, Petaling, Kuala Langat and Sepang) until 1:00PM; Monday, 29 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Kedah  (Yan, Kuala Muda, Kulim dan Bandar Baharu);  Pulau Pinang ;  Perak  (Kerian, Larut, Matang Dan Selama, Hulu Perak, Kuala Kangsar, Manjung, Kinta, Perak Tengah, Bagan Datuk dan Hilir Perak); dan  Selangor  (Sabak Bernam, Kuala Selangor, Klang, Petaling, Kuala Langat dan Sepang) sehingga 1:00 tengah hari; Isnin, 29 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: No Tropical Cyclone system is observed under MMD monitoring region (Latitude: 0-20 North & Longitude: 95-130 East)
data.text_bm: Tiada sistem Siklon Tropika dicerap di dalam kawasan pemantauan MMD (Latitud: 0-20 Utara & Longitud: 95-130 Timur)
